<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="page5" name="Page 5 — Common & Automation"> <mxGraphModel dx="706" dy="632" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="750" pageHeight="750" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" value="SumbiTheses System" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;spacingTop=5;align=center;arcSize=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="181" y="130" width="380" height="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="Common" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="201" y="170" width="340" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="133" value="UC33: View Notifications" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="231" y="200" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="134" value="UC34: Edit Profile" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="231" y="265" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" value="Automated Processes" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="201" y="350" width="340" height="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="135" value="UC35: Auto-Lock Expired Projects" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="231" y="390" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="136" value="UC36: Send Deadline Reminders" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="231" y="460" width="290" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" value="Student" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2ecc71;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="180" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="201" value="Teacher" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#3498db;opacity=50;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="280" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="202" value="System
(Scheduler)" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#333333;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#7f8c8d;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="71" y="400" width="40" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="300" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="200" target="133" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="301" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#2ecc71;" parent="1" source="200" target="134" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="302" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#3498db;" parent="1" source="201" target="133" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="303" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#3498db;" parent="1" source="201" target="134" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="310" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#7f8c8d;" parent="1" source="202" target="135" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="311" value="" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#7f8c8d;" parent="1" source="202" target="136" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="506" value="<i>&lt;&lt;include&gt;&gt;</i>
creates notifications" style="endArrow=open;endFill=0;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;fontSize=10;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#555555;" parent="1" source="136" target="133" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="191" y="485" /> <mxPoint x="191" y="225" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="600" value="UC35: Auto-Lock «include» UC18: Lock Project (see Page 3)" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=14;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;align=left;fontColor=#333333;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="201" y="580" width="350" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
